description: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining RAG, Tree-sitter AST, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: Insecure Secret Handling
findings.description: input parameter "max_tokens" appears to accept a secret or credential
findings.recommendation: Avoid accepting raw credentials as input parameters. Use secret managers (e.g. 1Password CLI, AWS Secrets Manager) and ensure credentials are never logged or stored in agent traces.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: DoS Resilience — Missing Rate Limit / Timeout
findings.description: tool performs network or execution operations but declares no rate-limit, timeout, or retry configuration
findings.recommendation: Declare explicit rate-limit, timeout, and retry configuration for all network and execution tools. Implement exponential back-off and surface resource state to the calling agent.
